## ![][image1]

Initial Planning Questionnaire Template \- Elopement & Intimate Wedding

**Why it matters:** I use this questionnaire to get to know my couples better and get all the info I need to suggest locations that match their vision, experience, preferences, and logistical needs. Especially for outdoor adventure elopements, it’s vital to get an accurate picture of what they truly desire (not just what they feel like they have to say) so the locations I suggest will align with their abilities & preferences to ensure they’ll really enjoy their experience.

**When to send:** I send this after my automatically delivered Welcome Email—right after they pay their retainer, so they can get the planning process started right away.

---

Initial Planning Questionnaire \- Elopement & Intimate Wedding

**You Two & Your Relationship**

* How did you two meet? Tell me the story and your first impressions of each other. (Each of you individually answer about the other person)

* What are some of your favorite qualities in your partner? What keeps you falling in love with them? (Each of you answer individually about the other person)

* Tell me a quintessential story that perfectly sums up your relationship. What memories do you look back on and always laugh? Do you have any inside jokes? 

* If your love story was a song, what would it be and why?

* Tell me about a time that really tested or really deepened your relationship (Each of you individually answer about the other person)

* Was there a proposal? How did it happen? Tell me the story\!

* If you two had a free day (with unlimited money and you can teleport anywhere you want) where you could do anything together, what would you do? 

* What are your individual hobbies and interests?

* Do you have any pets? Tell me about them\! Are you considering including them in your elopement?

* Tell me about your travel experiences, both independently and together. Do you two like road-tripping, sightseeing, backpacking, etc.? What's your travel style (planned vs. spontaneous, 5-star hotels vs. hostels and camping)?

* Tell me about your adventure and hiking experiences, both independently and together. What are your favorite types of adventures to do together? What kind of hikes have you loved most (length, steepness, views, etc.)? What is your style of adventure (exercise vs. leisure, destination-focused vs. journey-focused)?

* Is there anything I should know that either of you really DON'T like? (photography or otherwise)

**Your Elopement** 

* What’s the main reason you decided to get married this way instead of having a traditional wedding? 

* What types of scenery do you imagine exploring during your elopement? Do you have something specific in mind for your ceremony vs. the rest of your day? (Don't forget, we can go to multiple locations\!)

* What activities would you like to include in your elopement day (short hike, all-day hike, camping, canoeing, paddleboarding, relaxing in a hammock, picnicking, dancing around a campfire, stargazing, etc.)?

* Do you have a strong preference for sunrise or sunset on your elopement? Or do you like the idea of having enough continuous coverage to tie in both?

* Do you have any experience with dirt roads, 4WD roads, and OHV areas? Are you comfortable driving them yourself, would you be interested in hiring a professional driver to help, or should they be avoided altogether when suggesting elopement locations?

* Are there any restrictions I should know about when creating your location idea list? (i.e. Do you already have flights or accommodations booked? Do you need to be within a certain distance of a specific airport? etc.)

* Is there anything you \*really\* want to avoid during your elopement experience? Heights, steep drop-offs, cliff edges, strong winds, 4x4 roads, being too cold, being too hot, etc. Please be as honest and descriptive as possible about your preferences as possible.

* Are there any health risks that I should know about? (i.e. intolerance to high altitudes, intolerance to heat/cold, allergies, respiratory issues, joint/circulation issues, etc.)

* Is there anything else you'd like to add?

**If you have already invited guests, or are considering including guests, these next questions are for you\! If not, you're all done—you can scroll on and press submit :)**

* How many guests do you anticipate coming?

* Will your guests be a part of your entire day? Or will you take some time to adventure just the two of you?

* What is the ability level of your guests? Are there any mobility issues, health risks, or preferences to consider when picking a ceremony location?
